summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin SSO access to all internal dashboards and Accountant Hardware Tab notes display. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, not visible to users)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Admin SSO and Accountant Hardware Tab features verified working. Admin can access Support, Technician, Accountant, Dispatcher, Gate, and Supervisor dashboards via SSO.

admin_sso_support_dashboard.details: Admin can access /support route, Call Support Dashboard title visible

admin_sso_technician_dashboard.details: Admin can access /technician route, Technician Dashboard title visible

admin_sso_accountant_dashboard.details: Admin can access /accountant route, Accountant Dashboard title visible

admin_sso_dispatcher_dashboard.details: Admin can access /dispatcher route, Dispatcher Dashboard title visible

admin_sso_gate_dashboard.details: Admin can access /gate route, Gate Control title visible with Expected Incoming (33) and Ready to Ship (54)

admin_sso_supervisor_dashboard.details: Admin can access /supervisor route, shows 4 Escalated Tickets with SLA hours remaining (5h, 12h, 25h, 29h)

accountant_hardware_tab.details: Hardware Tab shows 10 tickets with proper note sections
features: ESCALATION NOTES (Agent to Supervisor) section (orange) visible with 'By: Angad Singh'
REVERSE PICKUP recommended action badge visible (orange)
SEND SPARE PART recommended action badge visible (blue)
Create Pickup Label button for reverse pickup tickets
Create Spare Dispatch button for spare part tickets
Process Ticket button for tickets without supervisor decision
'No supervisor decision yet' warning for tickets pending supervisor action

admin_user_edit.details: Admin can fully edit users including First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Role, and Password
admin_user_edit.functional_test: Successfully updated Suresh Yadav's phone from 9999999907 to 9999999997, 'User updated successfully' toast appeared

admin_user_create.details: Add New User dialog opens with all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Role, Password)

route_access_verification.confirmation: All routes accessible via Admin SSO as per App.js ProtectedRoute configuration with 'admin' in allowedRoles
